code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const HomePage=()=>{const[todos,setTodos]=useState([]);const[newTodo,setNewTodo]=useState('');const[error,setError]=useState('');const fetchTodos=async()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('jwtToken');try{const response=await axios.get('http://localhost:3000/todos',{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});setTodos(response.data);}catch(err){setError('Failed to fetch todos.
